description: GAIA self-knowledge: architecture, services, cognitive pipeline, repair patterns, identity, and epistemic calibration. Enables the local model to answer questions about GAIA's own systems without external retrieval.

architecture.description: Service blueprints, AS_BUILT, CLAUDE.md — architecture and service knowledge

self_repair.description: Dev journals, diagnostic patterns — troubleshooting and repair knowledge

epistemic.description: Samvega artifacts — error learning and epistemic calibration

self_awareness.description: Thought seeds, gap audit — knowledge gaps and self-reflection

identity.description: Core identity, SOP — who GAIA is and her operating principles

personality.description: Conversation examples — communication style and personality
